message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - jalapeño corn dog copy is live in the doc. Fair warning: I leaned into the nostalgia angle, the way these things taste like county fairs and grease and something almost reckless.
I'm reading it now and honestly? The "reckless" thing is working.
That means more coming from you - I half expected the trim-it-down email, so I'm genuinely relieved.
That's... actually really good to hear, because I was worried I'd been too hands-off with earlier drafts and missed something crucial.
You weren't hands-off, you caught the heat management issue nobody else saw. The copy works because the recipe works.
